title: Herobrine Return
description: HerobrineReturn is the most faithful plugin to the original Herobrine myth. No corrupted signs. chests and no chat messages. Just pure, unsettling presence.
body:
HerobrineReturn is the most faithful plugin to the original Herobrine myth.
 No corrupted signs. chests and no chat messages.
 Just pure, unsettling presence.
 
 **Requires:** [Citizen Plugin](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/citizens.13811/update?update=572248) 


в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ       HerobrineReturn       в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
 
 вңЁ **Features**
 
- рҹ‘ҒпёҸ Creepy, silent Herobrine NPC that watches players realistically, with no visible nameplate or tab entry.

- рҹҢҝ Temporary world corruption: leafless trees (vertical oak logs only), mycelium patches, and more. 

- рҹҢі Never places logs underground вҖ“ only above solid ground.

- вҡҷпёҸ Fully configurable: interval, duration, spawn chance, corruption radius, decay delay, and more via config.yml.

- рҹ”„ Automatic block restoration after disappearance вҖ” safe for your world.

- рҹ”Ҳ Uses vanilla ambient sounds to enhance the tension

- рҹ“ң Supports Denizen scripting: fully scriptable Herobrine behavior

  
YOU CAN CHANGE:

# # Herobrine Appearance Settings - -
- Interval between spawn checks
- % chance to spawn on each check
- How long Herobrine stays
- Delay (in seconds) before environment restoration
- Distance from player to despawn Herobrine

# # Herobrine Behavior - -
- Kick player if they get too close
- Kick message/reason.

# # Visual & Audio Effects - -
- Highlight Herobrine border (Only for debug)
- Enable realistic head tracking
- Enable ambient cave sounds
- Duration of ambient sound
- Volume of ambient sound
- Pitch of ambient sound
- Radius in which sound can be heard

# # Environment Corruption Settings - -
- Enable removal of leaves
- Enable mycelium spreading
- Enable generation of dead oak logs

# # Corruption Area Sizes - -
- Radius for removing leaves
- Radius for mycelium spread
- Radius for spawning dead trees
- Exclude center radius for log generation

# # Dead Tree Log Settings - -
- Minimum log height
- Maximum log height
- Maximum log count
- Minimum log count

# # Corruption Spawn Chances - -
- Chance per block in the mycelium radius
- Chance to spawn log at valid location


в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ        Author OBLIU         в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
